stemHtml: How can a flight crew ensure that their SELCAL system is functioning correctly?

options.a: The built-in test equipment (BITE) check is 100% accurate, so should be relied upon as a sole means of testing.
options.b: The crew should call a company aircraft on the ATC frequency to test that their SELCAL system is working correctly.
options.c: The crew should make an 'All Stations' call using SELCAL to make sure they heard by all aircraft on the frequency.
options.d: The crew should contact the appropriate ATC unit to request a SELCAL check, giving their code if necessary.
